design_philosophy.core_concept: Nature meets Precision. The interface should feel like a high-end gardening tool: robust, ergonomic, and beautiful.
key_principles: Biophilic Design: Use shapes and colors found in nature.
Data Clarity: Agronomists need to scan data quickly under sunlight.
Tactile Feedback: Buttons and interactions should feel physical.
Growth Narratives: Use timelines and progress bars to show tree growth.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles (h1, h2, h3). Friendly but geometric.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, data tables, and inputs. Highly legible.

mono.usage: Use for GPS coordinates, sensor data, and IDs.

glassmorphism.usage: Headers, Floating Action Buttons, Toast Notifications
glassmorphism.classes: bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-sm

gradients.usage: Very subtle, only for hero backgrounds or active states.

dashboard_grid.description: A dense, irregular grid for the Agronomist Dashboard.

gallery_grid.rules: Images must have consistent aspect ratio (cover) or use masonry layout.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/20 text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/30 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-6 py-2 font-medium

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-2xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-2xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-input/50 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base transition-all
inputs.search: pl-10 rounded-full bg-secondary/30 border-transparent focus:bg-background focus:border-primary

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Rounded line caps.
icons.usage: Use Leaf for trees, Sprout for seedlings, Droplets for irrigation, Scissors for pruning.

hero_landing.alt: Lush garden with sunlight and large trees

agronomist_dashboard.alt: Agronomist working with tablet in greenhouse

tree_sapling.alt: Young fruit tree sapling being planted

motion_guidelines.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly (0.98) on click. Toggle switches have a springy feel.
motion_guidelines.page_load: Staggered fade-in active active-y-4 for dashboard widgets.

accessibility_rules.contrast: Ensure text is readable on organic backgrounds. Use semi-transparent overlays on images.
accessibility_rules.touch_targets: Min 44px for all mobile interactions (Agronomists wear gloves!).
accessibility_rules.focus_states: Visible focus ring with color-primary for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the dashboard layout.
Use the provided image URLs for placeholders and specific sections.
Ensure the 'Tree Registration' form uses the browser's Geolocation API.
The 'Maintenance' section should feel like a checklist/timeline.
For the Landing Page, focus on the 'Growth' narrative using the hero image.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
